title: Rich Smoky Moroccan Almonds Amlou
description: A savory and creamy Moroccan dish featuring pecorino-romano cheese, with a smoky and slightly hot flavor, made with low-calorie-friendly ingredients in the form of amlou.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced almonds, crumbly pecorino-romano cheese, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil and honey until well combined.
Pour the olive oil and honey mixture over the almond mixture and stir until the almonds are evenly coated.
Spread the almond mixture out in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle the sea salt over the top of the almond mixture.
Bake the almond mixture in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Remove the almond mixture from the oven and let it cool completely.
Once the almond mixture has cooled, break it up into small clusters and serve.
